items.title: MDN MCP server is available
items.oneliner: Plug browser compatibility and MDN docs into AI coding tools with live web platform data.

items.title: Nub speeds up Node workflows
items.oneliner: Rust-built toolkit adds Bun-like watch mode, shims, and faster installs without replacing Node.js.

items.title: SSH tunnel guide is practical
items.oneliner: Hands-on tutorial shows local and remote port forwarding with commands you can reuse for private services.

items.title: RubyLLM unifies model providers
items.oneliner: Ruby framework gives one interface for major AI APIs, file analysis, image generation, and speech transcription.

items.title: LinkedRecords removes backend boilerplate
items.oneliner: MIT-licensed NoSQL stack lets SPA users control data storage locations without writing backend code.

items.title: Tropius scans prose for AI tropes
items.oneliner: CLI detects repeated AI writing patterns in text and URLs using phrase matching and structural checks.

items.title: Deno Desktop bundles web apps
items.oneliner: Canary tool turns Deno projects into standalone desktop binaries with bundled runtime and webview backends.

items.title: Global shortcuts support is tracked
items.oneliner: Community tracker shows which Wayland apps support secure global shortcuts instead of full input monitoring.

items.title: Nimic compiles Python ahead of time
items.oneliner: Experimental compiler transpiles a Python subset to Nim for AOT builds and near C-level performance.

items.title: Cold War Assault source is open
items.oneliner: Study and modify the remastered C++20 game engine code for a classic military sim on Windows and Linux.
